payload.answer: The extracted memory cards reflect the core principles of Brain as a durable, rebuildable truth source while enforcing constraints on ambiguity and fact validity. No conflicts detected.

entity_resolution.reason: OCR noise in source ('remalns', 'trvth', 'Cognee') requires contextual interpretation without altering core intent.

memory_cards.statement: A personal memory system (Brain) should serve as a durable, rebuildable source of truth.
Cognitive projections (e.g., memory reconstruction) must preserve ambiguity to avoid false precision.
Superseded or deleted facts must never be presented as current in the system.

details: Extracted 3 atomic memory cards with high/medium confidence.

No superseded facts detected in current extraction.
